name: Delta Air Lines

carryOn.notes: Must fit in overhead bin or under seat. No weight limit for carry-on.

economy.notes: $30 for first bag, $40 for second bag.

batteryRules.lithiumIon: Carry-on only for spare lithium batteries
batteryRules.spareBatteries: Must be in carry-on. Max 100Wh per battery without approval. 101–160Wh requires airline approval.
batteryRules.powerBankLimit: 100Wh without approval, up to 160Wh with approval
batteryRules.laptops: Allowed in carry-on. Remove from bag at security screening.

restrictedItems: Smart bags with non-removable lithium batteries exceeding 160Wh

faqs.question: Does Delta charge for carry-on bags?
faqs.answer: Basic Economy passengers on domestic flights may be charged for carry-on bag overhead space. Most other fare classes allow one carry-on bag and one personal item at no charge.

faqs.question: What is Delta's baggage fee for checked bags?
faqs.answer: For domestic flights: 1st bag is $30, 2nd bag is $40. International fees vary by route. SkyMiles Medallion members and certain credit card holders may receive complimentary bags.

faqs.question: Can I bring a power bank on Delta?
faqs.answer: Yes, power banks are allowed in carry-on bags only (not checked bags). Power banks must be 100Wh or less. Between 101–160Wh requires airline approval.
